Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm in Shinagawa Dungeon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see Maya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}nowadays i just log on to MMOs with bedhead and all (liek today lol)[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}but when i was little, ppl said i was a real cutie -_-;;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}guess i missed my chance rite? nobody thinks i'm hawt ne more T_T[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}...do men only want younger women? b honest ._.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems a little awkward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}when i get all worked up, i dun realize what comes outta my mouth =x[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}{f 5 13 10 5 1}that's wat im talkin about! u really get me ;D what's really important is tru luv![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}buuuut i think i tend to liek them on the younger side too tho :X lol[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems very happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}thought so... everyone knows it but it still sux to hear it for real orz T_T[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 5 13 10 15 1}fair is fair tho =P i tend to liek them on the younger side myself lol[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya begins to cower.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}btw, am i making ne sense? i hope so, cuz i teach composition!! o_O;;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}mkay, i'll be calm. i'll compose my bitching carefully for you ;P[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}one of my coworkers is really pissing me off. im trying to avoid her @_@[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}we use to teach teh same grade and we were together ALL THE TIME[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}its been a while but that kinda thing sticks w/ u, ya know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}ne way, she said she needed some advice, but then she just started bragging! ＞=([n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}some student asked her out, and a guy she doesn't liek proposed to her... UGH![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}im not jealous, its just so freakin annoying omg =_=;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}i hate skanky hoes liek her! just give the puppy-dog eyes and guys will do whatever![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}she even stuffs her bra!! lol[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}but thats rite, she's got fake tits[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}HAHahahahahhahaha!!!1 xDDDDDD ok for real tho keep dis between u an me, k? O=)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems to be enjoying herself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}{f 5 13 10 5 1}not my fault shes so insecure she has to equip buffs on her boobs. :V how fake can u be[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}im fine w/ massaging in teh shower and drnking more milk. all natural ;)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya's telling me more[n]than I wished to know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}i swear omg, i saw Ms. K running in late one time, rite? and uh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}her pads fell down an it looked liek she had 4!!! O_O XDDD[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}...theyre fake for sure u_u[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}my school is FULL of teachers like taht! -_-;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}man tatsuya, talkin to u is better than gettin a massage =P ::blush::[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}complaining online is now an important part of my days off ^_^[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems to like talking to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}we r s'posed to be fighting demons from hell, rite? ＞;)[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}...but after what i jus said, i might go to hell ne way o_O;;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}well... i rented sum DVDs, sooo... later, tatsuya! thx for chattin[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya's player signed off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to log out as well.[n]{f 1 1}
